data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective purple and cyan neon accents. Bird's eye view of a node graph workspace: circular nodes connected by glowing lines forming a branching tree pattern. Some nodes pulse with energy, others show small image thumbnails inside. Dark background with dramatic spotlight from above. Technical but artistic, like a circuit board meets constellation map.
